title: Aaron Alerts
description: A Minecraft 1.8.9 mod to remind users to kill sea creatures in Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# Aaron Alerts
Aaron is a Hypixel Skyblock mod that alerts you to kill sea creatures. It works on Forge 1.8.9

## Usage
In game, use `/aaronalerts on` to turn the alerts on, and `/aaronalerts off` to turn them off.

Every 5 minutes, the mod will display a title reminding you to kill sea creatures.
